---
title: "nitrix.metrics.intensity"
generated: true
signature-hash: 601b61d42d8c2290
description: "Intensity-based image-similarity metrics."
listing:
  id: nitrix-metrics-intensity-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-metrics-intensity/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.metrics.intensity`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Intensity-based image-similarity metrics.

- [`ssd`](nitrix-metrics-intensity/ssd.qmd) -- sum / mean of squared differences (within-modality;
  motion correction).
- [`ncc`](nitrix-metrics-intensity/ncc.qmd) -- global normalised cross-correlation (Pearson over all
  voxels; within-modality, robust to linear intensity change).
- [`lncc`](nitrix-metrics-intensity/lncc.qmd) -- local (windowed) normalised cross-correlation, the
  ANTs squared form -- the diffeomorphic workhorse, robust to smooth
  intensity inhomogeneity.

All are differentiable with respect to both arguments (they sit inside a
registration loss).  Convention: [`ssd`](nitrix-metrics-intensity/ssd.qmd) is a *cost* (minimise);
[`ncc`](nitrix-metrics-intensity/ncc.qmd) / [`lncc`](nitrix-metrics-intensity/lncc.qmd) are *similarities* in (roughly)
$[0, 1]$ (maximise, or minimise `1 - metric`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-metrics-intensity-symbols}
:::
